inputs.label: Equipment Power Rating

inputs.businessContext: Annual operating hours of the equipment.

businessContext_i18n.es: Horas anuales de funcionamiento del equipo.

inputs.label: Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of full power at which equipment typically operates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of full power at which equipment typically operates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ekipmanın tipik olarak çalıştığı tam güç yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der vollen Leistung, mit dem die Anlage typischerweise arbeitet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la puissance nominale à laquelle l'équipement fonctionne généralement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de potencia máxima al que opera típicamente el equipo.
Coste de la electricidad por kilovatio-hora.

businessContext_i18n.es: Superficie total del área de la instalación auditada.

inputs.label: CO2 Emission Factor
inputs.businessContext: Carbon emission factor for grid electricity.
